title: evolvulus harleyi
intro: Evolvulus harleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as the 'Dwarf Morning Glory'. It is a small, annual herb native to Brazil, and its name is derived from the scientific classification of the genus Evolvulus, which includes plants with similar characteristics. Evolvulus harleyi has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and is often consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
